channel.title: ImRizwan
channel.description: Developer blog by Rizwan — SPFx webparts, Power Platform solutions, SharePoint development tips.

item.title: Building Custom Connectors in Power Platform: Connect Any REST API (2026)
item.description: Step-by-step guide to building custom connectors in Power Platform. Connect any REST API to Power Apps and Power Automate with authentication, actions, and real-world examples.

item.title: Microsoft Graph Toolkit: Build M365-Powered Web Apps with Zero Backend Code (2026)
item.description: Learn how to use Microsoft Graph Toolkit components to display people, files, calendars, and tasks from Microsoft 365 in any web app — with full code examples and authentication setup.

item.title: SPFx and Fluent UI v9: Modern Web Parts with React
item.description: Learn how to use Fluent UI v9 (React Components) in SPFx web parts — from installation to theming, with practical migration tips from v8.

item.title: SharePoint Embedded: Build Document Apps on Microsoft 365
item.description: 2026 guide to SharePoint Embedded — create containers, manage files via Graph, and connect Power Automate and AI agents.

item.title: SPFx Application Customizer: Build Global Headers & Footers
item.description: Build a global header and footer for SharePoint with an SPFx Application Customizer extension. Complete guide includes tenant-wide deployment instructions.

item.title: Microsoft Lists JSON Formatting: Complete Guide (2026)
item.description: Master column, view, and form formatting in Microsoft Lists with copy-paste JSON examples. 2,100+ PnP community samples included.

item.title: Build M365 Copilot Declarative Agents
item.description: Step-by-step guide to building custom declarative agents for Microsoft 365 Copilot. Learn Teams Toolkit, plugins, and deployment in 30 minutes.

item.title: PnP PowerShell: Version & Requirements Guide
item.description: Master PnP.PowerShell requirements and latest version updates for 2026. Minimum PowerShell version specs, compatibility matrix, and setup guide.

item.title: Power Automate Expressions Reference
item.description: Essential Power Automate expressions cheat sheet with 50+ functions, quick reference guide, and copy-paste formulas for string, date, and logic operations.

item.title: SharePoint Online CSP Enforcement: SPFx Developer Guide
item.description: Fix SPFx web parts broken by Content Security Policy enforcement: resolve inline scripts, eval calls, and style violations with practical solutions.

item.title: Microsoft Copilot Governance: 8 Controls Every Admin Needs
item.description: 8 essential governance controls for M365 Copilot deployments: permission audits, sensitivity labels, content classification, and usage monitoring.

item.title: Microsoft Graph API: OAuth 2.0 and App Permissions Guide
item.description: Learn Microsoft Graph API authentication — OAuth 2.0 flows, Delegated vs. Application permissions, and how to acquire access tokens securely.

item.title: Master Graph API Authentication
item.description: Complete Microsoft Graph API authentication guide. App registration, OAuth flows, permissions, and MSAL setup with working code examples.

item.title: SharePoint Site Scripts & Provisioning
item.description: Essential guide to SharePoint site scripts, provisioning automation, and site design setup for modern flat-architecture sites with PnP PowerShell.

item.title: Migrate from Yeoman to the New SPFx CLI
item.description: Migrate legacy SPFx projects from Yeoman to the new Vite-based SPFx CLI pipeline for 4x faster builds in under 15 minutes.

item.title: Enterprise Governance for SharePoint-Powered AI: Checklist
item.description: Developer checklist for AI-ready SharePoint environments: PowerShell scripts, sensitivity labels, permissions audits, and pre-Copilot governance.

item.title: Adaptive Cards: Developer Guide (2026)
item.description: Master Adaptive Cards across Teams, Outlook, and Viva Connections. Schema versions, data binding, and a free card builder.

item.title: Migrating from Yeoman to the New SPFx CLI in 2026
item.description: Drop the outdated Yeoman generator. Learn how to scaffold modern SPFx web parts using the brand new Microsoft CLI tools.

item.title: M365 Copilot Governance Checklist for SharePoint Admins
item.description: Prevent data leaks before turning on Microsoft 365 Copilot. The essential 10-step SharePoint security and permissions checklist.

item.title: Power Automate: How to Style HTML Tables with CSS
item.description: Style Power Automate HTML tables with custom CSS for professional-looking emails. Free generator included to create polished email tables without writing code.

item.title: Migrate SPFx from Gulp to Heft & Webpack
item.description: Migrate SPFx from Gulp to Heft build system and significantly speed up your builds. Complete step-by-step migration guide for SPFx projects in 2026.

item.title: Copilot Studio + SharePoint: Build 3 AI Assistants
item.description: Build three AI assistants with Copilot Studio that answer questions directly from SharePoint document libraries. No coding required.

item.title: Build Custom Copilots for SharePoint
item.description: Step-by-step guide to building AI copilots with Copilot Studio grounded in SharePoint. Answers questions only from your org's documents securely.

item.title: SharePoint Online Permissions: Security Guide
item.description: Master SharePoint permissions by understanding permission levels, groups, external sharing controls, and PnP PowerShell audit scripts for governance.

item.title: Power Automate + AI Builder: Document Processing Guide
item.description: Extract and process data from invoices, receipts, and forms automatically using Power Automate and AI Builder. No coding or model training required.

item.title: Building Viva Connections Adaptive Card Extensions (ACEs)
item.description: Build interactive Viva Connections dashboard widgets with SPFx adaptive cards. Deploy real-time card extensions without a dedicated API.

item.title: Fetch M365 User Profiles in SPFx using the Graph API
item.description: Learn how to securely authenticate and fetch Microsoft 365 user profile data inside your SPFx components and Teams apps.

item.title: Power Apps Canvas App with SharePoint: Practical Guide
item.description: Build Power Apps canvas apps connected to SharePoint: data setup, interactive forms, advanced filters, and search functionality.

item.title: Build Your First SPFx Web Part: Hello World Guide (2026)
item.description: Create and deploy your first SharePoint Framework web part using the modern SPFx CLI with Heft. Works in SharePoint, Teams, and Viva.

item.title: Power Automate: Approval Workflow (2026)
item.description: Build a complete document approval workflow triggered on SharePoint uploads, with approval actions, conditional branching, and Teams notifications.

item.title: SharePoint Column Formatting: A Practical JSON Guide (2026)
item.description: Master JSON-based column formatting to build status badges, progress bars, and interactive visuals without code. Apply instant, tenant-scoped customizations.

item.title: Getting Started with Microsoft Graph API in 2026
item.description: Master Microsoft Graph: the unified API for M365 data. Learn authentication, make your first call, explore endpoints, and integrate with Power Automate.

item.title: PnP JS in SPFx: Read and Write SharePoint Data (2026)
item.description: Master PnP JS for CRUD operations, filtering, batching, and error handling in SharePoint. Write cleaner TypeScript with fluent APIs instead of raw REST.
